rationale:
Missing `docs/helix/02-design/` design note recording D1 library/project policy, override rules, file locations, and D2 UI scope.
Missing project-local persona support in `cli/internal/persona`, including `.ddx/personas/*.md` discovery, `source` tagging, override precedence, and unit tests.
Missing GraphQL schema and resolver additions for `personaCreate`, `personaUpdate`, and `personaDelete`.
Missing CLI commands `ddx persona new`, `ddx persona edit`, `ddx persona fork`, and `ddx persona delete`, plus shared operation plumbing with GraphQL.
Missing personas UI changes for explainer copy, source badges, project persona create/edit/delete, library fork action, and empty project-local hint.
Missing Playwright and integration coverage for the required UI flows, GraphQL/CLI parity, binding regression, and empty project-local state.
